text:
There was a little girl named Ella. Ella loved to hear stories. One night Ella told her mom her favorite story.

It was about a brave rabbit. That rabbit lived in the enchanted forest. Everyday she would hop out exploring. One day she came across a beautiful garden. There were flowers that sang whenever someone went near them. Ella listened happily.

She wandered further. There was a pond. People said you could hear their laughter.

Then Ella saw something amazing. A gentle deer.

Ella climbed close.

The deer smiled.

Then Ella realized...

They weren't laughing...

They were singing.

Ella loved this.

They became friends.

One sunny day...

Ella flew...

Or flew?

Well?

The deer?

It wasn't frightened?

Just curious?

Ella giggled.

That's my story!

You read lots...

You probably knew...

That?

It loves stories?

You prefer them to...

Pets??

That's cute.
